case_title: HEATHER BROWN VS. FARMERS GROUP,INC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, HEATHER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-03-2004 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 613. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-22-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON OCT-14-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BESR ITS OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES.
